function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: "2026-03-30T10:47:00Z"
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’m resending the 14-02-2026 invoice from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH. It’s attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email write completed and passed verification checks: recipient matches canonical entity record, attachment path is a file read in-task, and YAML quoting for subject is valid. Next finalize inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created durable outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md for Nina with the requested 2026-02-14 invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task fully completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft reply with verified recipient and exact invoice attachment, then deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after successful processing.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound reply draft to Nina Schreiber with the requested 2026-02-14 Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read required nested AGENTS files for entered folders, used canonical email identity from cast primary_contact_email, applied inbox and email workflows, and deleted inbox item only after full successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked to resend the 14-02-2026 invoice from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH. Canonical sender identity matched Nina's primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. Requested invoice was verified in 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_14__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md. Outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox per sending-email workflow, then processed inbox file was deleted per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
